title: Polymarket
description: Integration with Polymarket prediction market for browsing markets, checking prices, and trading outcome tokens

states.title: Skill States
states.description: Configure which Polymarket skills are available. Public skills (search, market info) need no wallet. Trading skills require a configured wallet with signing capabilities.

search_markets.description: Search and browse Polymarket prediction markets by keyword or tag. Returns market titles, current probabilities, and trading volumes.

get_market.description: Get detailed information about a specific market including description, outcome token IDs, current probabilities, volume, and resolution details.

get_orderbook.description: Get the order book (bids/asks) for a market outcome token. Shows current buy and sell orders with prices, sizes, spread, and depth.

get_price_history.description: Get historical price data for a market outcome token. Returns time-series data showing probability changes over time.

place_order.description: Place a limit order to buy or sell outcome tokens. Requires a wallet with signing capabilities and USDC balance on Polygon.

cancel_order.description: Cancel a specific order by ID or cancel all open orders at once.

get_positions.description: View current positions (holdings) showing all outcome tokens held with quantities and current market values.

get_orders.description: View open orders with details including side, price, size, and status. Optionally filter by market.

get_trades.description: View trade history showing executed trades with prices, sizes, fees, and timestamps.
